title: The Carcanet.
content:
Instead of orient pearls of jet
    I sent my love a carcanet;
    About her spotless neck she knit
    The lace, to honour me or it:
    Then think how rapt was I to see
    My jet t'enthral such ivory.
meaning:
"The Carcanet." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
